wheat.name: Wheat

soil_correction.low_ph: Apply Agricultural Lime @ 200 kg/acre. Wait 2 weeks before sowing.
soil_correction.high_ph: Apply Gypsum @ 100 kg/acre or Sulfur @ 50 kg/acre.

improvement_plan.week1: Apply lime or sulfur to correct pH
improvement_plan.week2: Apply basal dose of DAP and MOP at sowing
improvement_plan.week3: Top-dress with Urea after 3 weeks of sowing
improvement_plan.week4: Monitor crop, apply foliar spray if yellowing seen

wheat.description: Wheat is a major Rabi crop grown across India. It thrives in loamy soil with moderate temperatures and good drainage.
